title: Verification profiles
goal: Support named verification profiles like quick/full with per-command timeout, env, and cwd.
acceptance: Slices can reference verify_profile in addition to inline verify commands.
Verification commands support timeout_seconds, env, and repo-relative cwd.
must_ask_if: The slice requires changing the JSON-only worker result contract incompatibly.
The implementation would remove existing CLI/daemon commands.
Acceptance criteria conflict with the Khazad-Doom rule: You shall not slop.
